experimental_isolation_methodology.PRIMARY_INTERVENTION_VARIABLE: payload_not_parsed recovery via concise output-format anchor appended to tool-positive prompts: "Return one valid JSON object with top-level key tool_calls."
INVARIANTS: Overlap doctrine unchanged (heldout/tool_holdout prompt-target-case overlap must remain zero)
Dataset scale held stable at 2160 train / 240 val
No-call envelope preserved from stage_b_i1 split (756 train / 84 val non-tool rows)
Tool target distribution unchanged from i3 template (1404 train / 156 val tool-positive)
Wrapper leakage controls unchanged (system prompt + strict eval contract, no wrapper-specific suppression added)
Evaluation topology unchanged (canonical_eval_manifest_v1.json, decode defaults unchanged)
Canonical gating thresholds unchanged (Appendix A v3a)
EXPECTED_FAILURE_CLASSES: payload_not_parsed expected to remain dominant but should decrease versus i3
payload_not_object and missing_tool_calls may move secondarily but are not primary targets
no_call refusal_expected classes should remain stable
SUCCESS_CRITERIA: Heldout invalid_json_rate improves versus i3 (target <= 0.38 from i3=0.43)
Tool-expected payload_not_parsed count decreases versus i3 comparison_rows
ABORT_CONDITIONS: Any heldout/tool_holdout prompt or target overlap > 0 before training
Training/eval config drift from canonical manifest contract
Evidence of multi-variable intervention beyond payload_not_parsed objective
